data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the maximum capacity requirement of 12 people for the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants to proceed with the tour. This clearly demonstrates a gap in fulfilling the specified requirement, as the maximum capacity cannot be assessed when the minimum is not met.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
